description: You are a Farm and Home Management Educator consulting for a vegetable operation undergoing USDA Good Agricultural Practices (GAP) certification audit. To prepare for the auditor's arrival tomorrow, use the farmOS Field Kit app to document today's required GAP compliance activities by creating five logs. Create an Activity log named 'Worker hygiene training sign-in' at 6:30 AM (status: Done) with notes: '7 field workers signed FSMA hygiene training attestation form HYG-2024-03. Portable sanitation units at field stations 1-3 confirmed clean, sanitizer restocked, handwashing water temp verified above 60F.' Create an Input log named 'Irrigation well water E.coli sampling' at 8:00 AM (status: Done)
